name: pitfalls-tanstack-query
description: TanStack Query v5 patterns and common pitfalls. Use when implementing data fetching, cache invalidation, or debugging stale data issues. Triggers on: useQuery, useMutation, queryKey, invalidate, TanStack, React Query.
capabilities: Review useQuery implementations for correct patterns
Check mutations for proper cache invalidation
Identify stale data issues in React components
Verify queryKey deduplication with full URL paths
Migrate from v4 to v5 patterns (isPending vs isLoading)
author: BarisSozen
securitySummary: This is a documentation-only skill containing markdown and TypeScript code examples. All 16 static findings are false positives: TypeScript template literals were misidentified as shell commands, API patterns were misidentified as cryptographic code, and metadata fields were misidentified as network/filesystem access. No executable code, network calls, or file system operations exist.
valueStatement: TanStack Query v5 introduces breaking changes and subtle caching behaviors that cause bugs. This skill provides proven patterns and anti-patterns for correct data fetching, mutations, and cache invalidation.
limitations: Does not execute code or run tests
Does not access external APIs or databases
Does not handle server-side rendering concerns

useCases.title: Debug Data Fetching
useCases.description: Fix data fetching bugs in React components using TanStack Query

useCases.title: Review Code Quality
useCases.description: Review pull requests that use TanStack Query for common mistakes

useCases.title: Migrate to v5
useCases.description: Identify v4 patterns that need updating to v5

promptTemplates.title: Basic Review
promptTemplates.prompt: Review this useQuery implementation for correct TanStack Query v5 patterns. Check queryKey structure, queryFn, and options:

promptTemplates.title: Mutation Check
promptTemplates.prompt: Check this useMutation for proper cache invalidation. Does it invalidate the correct queries on success?

promptTemplates.title: Optimistic Update
promptTemplates.prompt: Show me the correct pattern for optimistic updates with rollback in TanStack Query v5. Include onMutate, onError, and onSettled handlers.

promptTemplates.title: Migration Guide
promptTemplates.prompt: Identify all v4 patterns in this code that need updating to v5. Specifically look for isLoading that should be isPending.

bestPractices: Use full URL paths in queryKeys like ['/api/strategies', id] for proper deduplication
Always invalidate relevant queries in onSuccess of useMutation to keep cache fresh
Use isPending instead of isLoading for mutation state checks in v5
antiPatterns: Short queryKeys like ['strategy'] that prevent proper deduplication across components
Forgetting to call queryClient.invalidateQueries after mutations causing stale data
Using isLoading instead of isPending for mutation state checks in v5

faq.question: What TanStack Query versions are supported?
faq.answer: This skill focuses on TanStack Query v5. Some v4 patterns are covered for migration guidance.

faq.question: What are the limits of this skill?
faq.answer: It provides pattern guidance and code review but does not execute or modify your actual codebase.

faq.question: Does this skill integrate with other tools?
faq.answer: It works with any React project using TanStack Query. No additional setup required.

faq.question: Is my data safe?
faq.answer: Yes. This is a prompt-based skill that never accesses your files or makes network calls.

faq.question: Why is my data stale after mutations?
faq.answer: Likely missing queryClient.invalidateQueries in onSuccess. The skill can identify and fix this pattern.

faq.question: How does this compare to React Query v4?
faq.answer: v5 renamed isLoading to isPending and changed some default behaviors. This skill identifies v4 patterns needing updates.
